# PHIL.049 ? Realism (Medieval)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** medieval_religious
**Subcategory:** realism_medieval
**Domain:** MEDIEVAL_RELIGIOUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Universals exist independently; Platonic forms in divine mind; intelligible essences; ante rem (before things) reality

## Application
Recognize reality of universals; intelligible essences; forms in divine intellect; realist ontology; essential natures

## Key Values
- Universal reality
- Essences
- Intelligible forms
- Realist ontology

philosophy, medieval-religious, realism-medieval
